betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Throughout your journey, you will stumble upon §4complex §frecipes.
This is where §bHEI Autocrafting §fwill come in handy.

§6How can you use Autocrafting?§f
- First, open your specific recipe by pressing §6§bR §fon the item. §bBookmark it §for §bAdd it to Favourite§f, if the bracket is §aGreen§f you are doing good. 

- Second, see if you have the required items, you can hold §bCTRL §fand §bScroll UP or DOWN§f to change the amount of items you want to craft.
You can also add additional bookmarked recipes for items required in your main recipe by §bCTRL+Left Click §fand drag the recipes into the bracket. 

- And finally third, you can craft the entire content of the bracket by pressing §bSHIFT + C§f if you have the required items and tools. The item will be crafted into your inventory.


§8Using this on the vanilla crafting table is recommended, you can now avoid the crafting station!
